title: COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS - 211info
text: COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates a network of safety net clinics which serve Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members, uninsured individuals, and low-income populations. Services include assistance with OHP enrollment, finding doctors and dentists, and support for basic needs. Website provides tools to locate the clinics that serve OHP members and uninsured individuals in various locations. 401 NE 19th Avenue #200 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by clinic Hours: Referral: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clinics: Hours vary; visit website for more information Email (503) 546-4991 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-4991 Health Navigator & Enrollment Specialist [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by clinic. Some clinics offer free services and others offer sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Burmese, Karen, Thai AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Navigator Programs Physician Referrals * People With Inadequate Health Insurance Physician Referrals * People Without Health Insurance Planning/Coordinating/Advisory Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COALITION OF COMMUNITY HEALTH CLINICS
